navy_seal.name: Navy SEAL
navy_seal.special: Starts with March; 1-2 First Strikes; Amphibious

camel_archer.name: Camel Archer
camel_archer.special: No Horse required; First Strike Immunity; +50% vs Melee; desert movement

jaguar.name: Jaguar
jaguar.special: No Iron required; heals +10 HP after kills; forest/jungle move at normal cost

bowman.name: Bowman
bowman.special: Starts with Drill I + City Garrison I

cataphract.name: Cataphract
cataphract.special: Starts with Shock I; +25% vs Melee

gallic_warrior.name: Gallic Warrior
gallic_warrior.special: No Iron required; starts with Guerrilla I

east_indiaman.name: East Indiaman
east_indiaman.special: Carries 3 units; +1 trade route; +1 Food on sea tiles

war_chariot.name: War Chariot
war_chariot.special: No Horse required; First Strike Immunity

oromo_warrior.name: Oromo Warrior
oromo_warrior.special: First Strike Immunity; starts with Drill I + Drill II

musketeer.name: Musketeer
musketeer.special: Starts with Woodsman I; +25% forest defense

panzer.name: Panzer
panzer.special: 3 movement vs 2 for Tank; same strength

holkan.name: Holkan
holkan.special: First Strike Immunity; no Hunting required

landsknecht.name: Landsknecht
landsknecht.special: Cheaper; +100% vs Melee AND +100% vs Mounted

samurai.name: Samurai
samurai.special: Bushido: fights at full strength regardless of current HP

ballista_elephant.name: Ballista Elephant
ballista_elephant.special: Can attack without moving; can bombard city defenses

hwacha.name: Hwacha
hwacha.special: Starts with Cover I; stronger base

skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher.special: No Archery tech required; +25% vs Mounted

dog_soldier.name: Dog Soldier
dog_soldier.special: +50% vs Mounted; no Copper or Iron required

janissary.name: Janissary
janissary.special: Starts with Shock I + Cover; heals 10 HP after kills

immortal.name: Immortal
immortal.special: No Horse required; starts with Combat I; can cross rivers normally

praetorian.name: Praetorian
praetorian.special: 8 Str vs 6 for Swordsman; same cost

cossack.name: Cossack
cossack.special: Starts with Flanking I + II; attacks at full strength

conquistador.name: Conquistador
conquistador.special: Can found cities; treats all terrain as road for movement

vulture.name: Vulture
vulture.special: +100% vs Melee; starts with Shock I; no Copper required

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.special: Amphibious; can attack twice per turn

impi.name: Impi
impi.special: 2 movement; +25% vs Mounted; cheaper; flanking damage on victory
